subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their roles (e.g., vendor, customer, service provider), and contact addresses from the multi-party contract document.

plan.cost_rationale: Single extract subtask (mid tier) is sufficient. Multi-party contract extraction requires identifying multiple entities with their attributes (name, role, address) in a single pass. Mid tier is appropriate because: (1) the extraction requires parsing multiple related entities rather than simple single-field extraction, (2) it needs to distinguish between different party roles which may require some contextual reasoning, and (3) it must handle variable numbers of parties. This is a single source document, so no cross_recon is needed. One subtask minimizes cost while maintaining reliability for the moderate complexity of multi-party entity extraction.
